For Academic Year Stays (13 weeks and longer & August, September, October 2026 move-ins): -

1. Instant Payments: 2% discount

2. Single Payment: 0% discount

3. Payment in 2 Installments: 2% interest

4. Payment in 3 or 4 installments: for 24+ weeks bookings, 3% interest

5. Payment in 5 or 6 instalments: for 37+ weeks bookings, 4% interest

For Flexible Stays(13 weeks and longer & Nov, Dec 2026, Jan, Feb, Mar, Apr, May, Jun, Jul 2027 check-ins):-

2. Single Payment: 0% discount

3. Payment in 2 Installments: 2% interest

4. Payment in 3 or 4 installments: for 24+ weeks bookings, 3% interest

5. Payment in 5 or 6 instalments: for 37+ weeks bookings, 4% interest

For Short-Term Booking(12 weeks and shorter): -

Single Payment: 0% interest

For Academic year contact - Pay 1st rent payment by 7th July 2026.

For Flexible all year check-in contract - Pay 1st rent payment 4 weeks before check-in.

feature_tags.name: cancellation_policy
feature_tags.value:
For 26-27 AY:-

Cancellation Policy for Long-Term Bookings (13 Weeks or More):

The property offers free cancellation for visa refusals up until 4 weeks before check-in, with only the holding deposit being retained.

Cancellation Terms:

1. If the cancellation occurs more than 4 weeks before check-in, you will receive a full refund except for the holding fee (i.e., cancellation fee: £250).

2.  If the cancellation occurs within 0-4 weeks before check-in, you will receive a full refund except for the holding fee and 4 weeks' rent (i.e., cancellation fee: £250 + 4 weeks’ rent).

3.  If the cancellation occurs after check-in but before 2nd Oct 2026, you have not collected the keys, the cancellation fee will be £250 + 4 weeks’ rent + accumulated rent from your check-in date until the date of notification.

Please note: The property does not allow cancellations for visa refusals once you have checked in and collected the keys. However, for bookings of 13 weeks or more, a replacement option may be available.


Cancellation Policy for Long-Term Bookings (12 weeks and shorter):

If you cancel more than 2 weeks before your check-in date, only the holding fee of £250 will be retained, and the remaining amount will be refunded.

Important Note: Cancellations are not allowed within 2 weeks before check-in, including cases of visa refusal.


For 25-26 AY:-

The property offers free cancellation for visa refusals up until 2 weeks before check-in, with only the holding deposit being retained.

Cancellation Terms:

1. If the cancellation occurs within the cooling-off period, you will receive a full refund, including the holding fee (i.e., cancellation fee: £0).

2. If the cancellation occurs more than 2 weeks before check-in, you will receive a full refund except for the holding fee (i.e., cancellation fee: £250).

3. If the cancellation occurs within 0-2 weeks before check-in, you will receive a full refund except for the holding fee and 2 weeks' rent (i.e., cancellation fee: £250 + 2 weeks’ rent).

4. If the cancellation occurs after check-in and you have not collected the keys, the cancellation fee will be £250 + 2 weeks’ rent + accumulated rent from your check-in date until the date of notification.

Please note: The property does not allow cancellations for visa refusals once you have checked in and collected the keys. However, for bookings of 37 weeks or more, a replacement option may be available.

feature_tags.name: cancellation_policy
feature_tags.value:
For 25-26 AY & 26-27 AY:-


If you fail to obtain a UK Visa before the start date of your tenancy, they will cancel your Tenancy Agreement and refund any rent payments made so long as you provide the following information:

  • Written confirmation from you that you wish to cancel your reservation; and
  • Supporting official evidence to show that the Visa was declined.

This supporting evidence should be supplied to property within 72 hours of you receiving official confirmation. In these circumstances, any Booking Fee and any rent paid will be returned to you.
feature_tags.short_text: Visa-related cancellation refund available with required documentation within 72 hours. Booking fee returned.

feature_tags.name: payment
feature_tags.value:
For 25-26 AY & 26-27 AY:-


You can either pay for the whole year upfront, or in two or four instalments spread throughout the year. You will be informed of the due dates for these instalments during the booking process.


The first instalment is usually due on 1st August each year but if this date has already passed you need to make this payment as soon as possible to secure your booking.

feature_tags.name: cancellation_policy
feature_tags.value:
For 25-26 & 26-27 AY: -


No Visa, Denied Visa Cancellation

If your visa application is refused and you are therefore unable to enter the UK to begin your university degree, you may cancel your booking without being bound by the contract. To qualify, you must provide us with official evidence of the visa refusal within 7 calendar days of the date stated on the refusal letter or correspondence from the visa authority.

Please send the documentation to the property management. Once received, they will verify the documents, and if they meet the requirements, your agreement will be cancelled.


Note: The advance rent paid is non refundable
feature_tags.short_text: Visa denial allows cancellation without penalty, with proof required within 7 days.

location.name: Prestige Student Living Charles Morton Court

feature_tags.name: cancellation_policy
feature_tags.value:
For AY 26-27:

INTERNATIONAL VISA APPLICANTS ONLY

Before the Tenancy Start Date

1. If you are unable to obtain a UK visa and your tenancy has not yet started, you may be eligible to cancel your tenancy agreement without penalty and receive a full refund of your deposit, provided that:

2. You send an email from the email address used for booking to your property’s email address (if already in residence),

confirming that your visa application has been unsuccessful and that you wish to cancel your booking. Include your full name and property details.

3. You attach the official visa refusal notice issued by UK Visas & Immigration.

4. These documents must be received within 3 calendar days of receiving your visa refusal notification and no later than 20th September for bookings for the upcoming academic year.

Note: If this documentation is not received within the timeframe or after your tenancy has started, you will remain liable for the rent until a suitable replacement tenant is found and the room is successfully re-let.

After the Tenancy Start Date

If you have not collected your keys:

1. You will be held rent liable until a suitable replacement tenant is found and approved by the landlord.

2. If your visa is revoked after moving in:

a) You must notify the property team within 48 hours of receiving the official notice by emailing to your property email address.

b) You will need to provide:

The official revocation notice from UK Visas & Immigration, and a letter from your university confirming your release from studies.

Once verified, next steps regarding your tenancy will be communicated by the property team.

For 25-26 Jan Intake ( Short Term Lets):

No Visa No Pay will depend on property discretion.
feature_tags.short_text: Free cancellation for international visa applicants before tenancy start date, conditions apply for refund.

feature_tags.name: payment
feature_tags.value:
For AY 25-26 & AY 26-27:

1. If you have a UK guarantor, you're eligible to pay your rent in three instalments, with the first payment due three weeks before your check-in date.

2. If you do not have a UK guarantor, you’ll need to pay your rent in full at least six weeks before your tenancy start date.

Please ensure that all rent due has been paid before you arrive to check in.

Note: In some cases, alternative instalment plans may be available. Please contact property management to discuss your options.

For 26-27 AY:-

1. Once the “Cooling Off” period has expired, you can cancel your booking prior to the tenancy start date if you do not have a visa to enter the UK.

2. In these circumstances, please provide evidence (Visa refusal documentation) to the property within 72 hours of being notified.

feature_tags.name: cancellation_policy
feature_tags.value:
Once the Cooling-Off Period has ended:

  1. You will be bound by the terms of the Tenancy Agreement
  2. The Advance Rent Payment is a “holding deposit” as defined in paragraph 3(2), Schedule 1 of Tenant Fees Act 2019 and will be held until the first Rent payment falls due under your Tenancy Agreement and will be offset against the amount due.
  3. You will remain liable for the Rent due under the Tenancy Agreement for the whole of the Tenancy Period.

You may be able to cancel your tenancy if you are outside of the cooling off period/s if you are unable to obtain a visa.

You must email the property explaining the reason you need to cancel. They will also require official written evidence from your place of Education, UCAS or Visa/Embassy within 7 (seven) calendar days of you being notified or the decision being published or reached.

If sufficient evidence is provided to their satisfaction, you will be eligible for release from the Tenancy Agreement If your application to be released from your contract has been approved, but your contract has already commenced, then you will be liable for all the rent owed up until the date you provided evidence in writing.
feature_tags.short_text: Bound by agreement after Cooling-Off Period. Can cancel with visa issue, subject to conditions.

feature_tags.name: cancellation_policy
feature_tags.value:
For 26-27 AY: -

If you are not successfully awarded a visa to travel and study, then the property team can assist you. Firstly, they may be able to transfer you to another one of their residences around the globe if you are going to study elsewhere. If you are not going to study elsewhere or they do not have accommodation available in your new city/town of study, they will release you from your tenancy agreement provided the following criteria are met:

1. You submit your request to cancel, in writing or by e-mail to the manager at the property, within 3 days of your visa rejection letter: and

2. You provide the manager with a copy of your rejection letter from the embassy or visa office.

If your tenancy has commenced, you will remain liable for the rent payable under the tenancy agreement until receipt of the above.


For 25-26 AY: -

If you are not successfully awarded a visa to travel and study, then the property team can assist you. Firstly, they may be able to transfer you to another one of their residences around the globe if you are going to study elsewhere. If you are not going to study elsewhere or they do not have accommodation available in your new city/town of study, they will release you from your tenancy agreement provided the following criteria are met:

1. You submit your request to cancel, in writing or by e-mail to the manager at the property, within 3 days of your visa rejection letter: and

2. You provide the manager with a copy of your rejection letter from the embassy or visa office.If your tenancy has commenced, you will remain liable for the rent payable under the tenancy agreement until receipt of the above.
feature_tags.short_text: Visa rejection assistance available for study abroad. Criteria and rent liability explained.

feature_tags.name: cancellation_policy
feature_tags.value:
For 25-26 AY & 26-27 AY:-


If you fail to obtain a UK Visa before the start date of your tenancy, they will cancel your Tenancy Agreement and refund any rent payments made so long as you provide the following information:

  • Written confirmation from you that you wish to cancel your reservation; and
  • Supporting official evidence to show that the Visa was declined.

This supporting evidence should be supplied to property within 72 hours of you receiving official confirmation. In these circumstances, any Booking Fee and any rent paid will be returned to you.
feature_tags.short_text: Visa-related cancellation refund available with required documentation within 72 hours. Booking fee returned.

feature_tags.name: payment
feature_tags.value:
For 25-26 AY & 26-27 AY:-


You can either pay for the whole year upfront, or in two or four instalments spread throughout the year. You will be informed of the due dates for these instalments during the booking process.


The first instalment is usually due on 1st August each year but if this date has already passed you need to make this payment as soon as possible to secure your booking.
feature_tags.short_text: This property offers flexible instalment plan.

feature_tags.name: cancellation_policy
feature_tags.value:
Once the Cooling-Off Period has ended:

  1. You will be bound by the terms of the Tenancy Agreement
  2. The Advance Rent Payment is a “holding deposit” as defined in paragraph 3(2), Schedule 1 of Tenant Fees Act 2019 and will be held until the first Rent payment falls due under your Tenancy Agreement and will be offset against the amount due.
  3. You will remain liable for the Rent due under the Tenancy Agreement for the whole of the Tenancy Period.

You may be able to cancel your tenancy if you are outside of the cooling off period/s if you are unable to obtain a visa.

You must email the property explaining the reason you need to cancel. They will also require official written evidence from your place of Education, UCAS or Visa/Embassy within 7 (seven) calendar days of you being notified or the decision being published or reached.

If sufficient evidence is provided to their satisfaction, you will be eligible for release from the Tenancy Agreement If your application to be released from your contract has been approved, but your contract has already commenced, then you will be liable for all the rent owed up until the date you provided evidence in writing.
feature_tags.short_text: Bound by agreement after Cooling-Off Period. Can cancel with visa issue, subject to conditions.

feature_tags.name: cancellation_policy
feature_tags.value:
If you are declined a Visa to study in the UK, by UK Visas and Immigration, you may cancel and obtain a full refund if notice is provided to the property before 16th August 2025, unless:


1. You did not complete all necessary steps required by UKVI to complete your visa application

2. Your university was unable to issue you with a CAS Number to obtain your visa owing to you not completing all necessary steps to complete your application to study.


Please note: -

1. You must supply suitable proof to the property in writing within 48 hours of being made aware of the change in circumstances and they may request additional information to support your cancellation request to satisfy ourselves of the circumstances of your request.

2. If at any point you have checked in to your Accommodation, you are unable to cancel your Agreement free of charge and must find a replacement student.
feature_tags.short_text: Full refund for UK Visa decline before 16th Aug 2025, with required proof and conditions.

feature_tags.name: payment
feature_tags.value:
For 25-26 AY: -

1. Payment in full: Due on 1st August 2025 2. Payment in 2 installments: Due on 1st August 2025 and 19th January 20263. Payment in 4 installments: Due on 1st August 2025, 2nd October 2025, 19th January 2026, and 15th April 2026.

Please note:

1. As the contract start date approaches, the property management have made a key update regarding the first instalment. Students are now required to make their first instalment payment within 72 hours of making a booking.

2. An additional surcharge will need to be paid if you choose to pay the rent in installments.

For 24-25 AY: -

1. Payment in full. This will be due on 1st August 2024

2. Payment in 2 installments due on 1st August 2024 & on 1st February 2025.

3. Payment in 4 installments due on 1st August 2024, 2nd October 2024, 19th January 2025, & on 15th April 2025.

Please note: -

1. For 44-week tenancies, a 10% surcharge will apply if you choose the installment plan option.

2. For 51-week tenancies, a surcharge based on the room type will apply if you choose the installment plan option.
feature_tags.short_text: This property offers 1, 2, 4 flexible instalment plans.

feature_tags.name: payment
feature_tags.value:
For 26-27 AY:-

For Academic Year Stays (13 weeks and longer & August, September, October 2026 move-ins): -

1. Instant Payments: 2% discount

2. Single Payment: 0% discount

3. Payment in 2 Installments: 2% interest

4. Payment in 3 or 4 installments: for 24+ weeks bookings, 3% interest

5. Payment in 5 or 6 instalments: for 37+ weeks bookings, 4% interest

For Flexible Stays(13 weeks and longer & Nov, Dec 2026, Jan, Feb, Mar, Apr, May, Jun, Jul 2027 check-ins):-

1. Instant Payments: 2% discount

2. Single Payment: 0% discount

3. Payment in 2 Installments: 2% interest

4. Payment in 3 or 4 installments: for 24+ weeks bookings, 3% interest

5. Payment in 5 or 6 instalments: for 37+ weeks bookings, 4% interest

For Short-Term Booking(12 weeks and shorter): -

Single Payment: 0% interest

Please note:

For Academic year contact - Pay 1st rent payment by 7th July 2026.

For Flexible all year check-in contract - Pay 1st rent payment 4 weeks before check-in.


For 25-26 AY:-

For Academic Year Stays (37 weeks and longer & August, September, October 2025 move-ins): -

1. Instant Payments: 2% discount

2. Single Payment: 1.5% discount

3. Payment in 2 Installments: Same rent amount

4. Payment in 3 or 4 installments: 2% interest

For Flexible Stays: -

Payment Plans For Short-Term Booking: -

Single Payment: Same Rent Amount

Payment Plans For Long-Term Booking: -

1. Single Payment: Same Rent Amount

2. Payment in 2 Installments: Same Rent Amount

3. Payment in 3 or 4 installments: 2% interest

Please note:

For Academic year contact - Pay 1st rent payment by 15th July 2025.

For Flexible all year check-in contract - Pay 1st rent payment 4 weeks before check-in.

feature_tags.name: cancellation_policy
feature_tags.value:
For 26-27 AY:-

Cancellation Policy for Long-Term Bookings (13 Weeks or More):

The property offers free cancellation for visa refusals up until 4 weeks before check-in, with only the holding deposit being retained.

Cancellation Terms:

1. If the cancellation occurs more than 4 weeks before check-in, you will receive a full refund except for the holding fee (i.e., cancellation fee: £250).

2.  If the cancellation occurs within 0-4 weeks before check-in, you will receive a full refund except for the holding fee and 4 weeks' rent (i.e., cancellation fee: £250 + 4 weeks’ rent).

3.  If the cancellation occurs after check-in but before 2nd Oct 2026, you have not collected the keys, the cancellation fee will be £250 + 4 weeks’ rent + accumulated rent from your check-in date until the date of notification.

Please note: The property does not allow cancellations for visa refusals once you have checked in and collected the keys. However, for bookings of 13 weeks or more, a replacement option may be available.


Cancellation Policy for Long-Term Bookings (12 weeks and shorter):

If you cancel more than 2 weeks before your check-in date, only the holding fee of £250 will be retained, and the remaining amount will be refunded.

Important Note: Cancellations are not allowed within 2 weeks before check-in, including cases of visa refusal.


For 25-26 AY:-

The property offers free cancellation for visa refusals up until 2 weeks before check-in, with only the holding deposit being retained.

Cancellation Terms:

1. If the cancellation occurs within the cooling-off period, you will receive a full refund, including the holding fee (i.e., cancellation fee: £0).

2. If the cancellation occurs more than 2 weeks before check-in, you will receive a full refund except for the holding fee (i.e., cancellation fee: £250).

3. If the cancellation occurs within 0-2 weeks before check-in, you will receive a full refund except for the holding fee and 2 weeks' rent (i.e., cancellation fee: £250 + 2 weeks’ rent).

4. If the cancellation occurs after check-in and you have not collected the keys, the cancellation fee will be £250 + 2 weeks’ rent + accumulated rent from your check-in date until the date of notification.

Please note: The property does not allow cancellations for visa refusals once you have checked in and collected the keys. However, for bookings of 37 weeks or more, a replacement option may be available.

feature_tags.name: cancellation_policy
feature_tags.value:
For 25-26 AY & 26-27 AY:-

Your application for a visa has been declined. Please note that this does not include situations where your visa has been granted and subsequently withdrawn.


If you meet the above Cancellation Criteria and can provide the property with evidence demonstrating that you meet the above criteria, your request for cancellation will be granted. If you have already accepted your Tenancy Agreement and paid your first instalment of Rent at the date your cancellation request is granted, they will refund you the first instalment of Rent less any Holding Fee paid (or an amount equivalent to the Holding Fee if you booked your room after 31st July).
feature_tags.short_text: Cancellation allowed for visa decline with evidence, refund first rent minus Holding Fee.
